content.en:
"The battle situation in Taisu Palace is not good?"

Ye Tian had just come out of the customs and got the news.

Subsequently, he learned the specific news, it turned out to be a newly born sevenfold supreme Dao realm in Wuji Heavenly Palace, and ambushed a team of Taisu Palace and other forces, killing three sixfold supreme Dao realms.

Since Taisu Palace did not expect the birth of this Sevenfold Dao Realm, this was a strategic mistake.

And this newly born Sevenfold Dao Realm still has something to do with Ye Tian, he is Bai Ye, and now he should be called Bai Ye Tianzun.

"Bai Ye Tianzun, this guy has actually broken through to the Sevenfold Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

This guy didn't even comprehend the rules of the seventh sequence of the supreme path before, so it stands to reason that it is impossible to break through in a short period of time!

The only possibility is that after the Wuji Heavenly Emperor was suppressed, this guy obtained a certain treasure of the Wuji Heavenly Palace and used that treasure to break through.

If the Wuji Heavenly Emperor hadn't been sealed, they would naturally not dare to use it, but now that the Wuji Heavenly Emperor has been suppressed, it is the group of Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm who are in charge, and they can use whatever treasures they want.

In these long years, no one knows how many good things Wuji Heavenly Palace has collected.

"I have to find a way to get out, kill some more Sixfold Dao Realm, and reduce the pressure on the forces such as Taisu Palace!" Ye Tian muttered.

And going out is very simple, that is, copying the body of another Dao Realm and using the opponent's battlefield order.

The breath is the same, the origin is the same, and the battlefield order will naturally be used by him, so that he can leave the battlefield.

When the time comes, copy other copies of the body in the outside world, and then return to the battlefield and return the battlefield order.

If you kill other Dao realms, the battlefield order will be directly annihilated, and you won't be able to get it.

"There are Zhidao realms on the battlefield that have fallen into heavy losses and are sleeping, and the battlefield order can't be used, so I take advantage of their sleep and take their battlefield order to use it, there should be no problem!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Soon.

He took advantage of his privilege and came to a void where a Triple Supreme Dao Realm was sleeping, and Ye Tian could just copy the other party's body.

Silently, the battlefield order on the other party's body was taken away by Ye Tian.

And he copied the opponent's body, activated the battlefield order, and left directly from Taisu Battle City and returned to the outside world.

"Copy!"

Ye Tian quickly copied his true body, sped up time, and soon copied successfully.

Then, Ye Tian came back and returned the battlefield order to the other party.

In this way, Ye Tian easily came out of the battlefield of the True Dao Domain.

......

Infinite Heavenly Palace.

Bai Ye Tianzun is reporting to the Six Cry Tianzun.

"Lord Liuqi Tianzun, now that the offensive of Taisu Palace has slowed down, if it continues, our Wuji Heavenly Palace is very likely to win!"

"Baiye Tianzun, you are also Tianzun now, there is no need to call me an adult. However, you are now the weakest in the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, and you can only rely on the Void Realm Pill to forcibly break the shackles and be promoted to the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, if you can't comprehend the rules of the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao, your combat power will be very weak, and any of you can kill you!"

"Sixth Cry Tianzun, I also know, but it is too difficult to comprehend the rules of the seventh sequence of supreme paths, it is difficult to do it in a short period of time!"

Liuqi Tianzun nodded slightly, "It's really difficult, but there is still a Wuji Supreme Dao Fruit in the No. 1 Treasury of Wuji Heavenly Palace, but that treasure house can only be opened by the Wuji Heavenly Emperor, and we can't open it now, otherwise we can give it to you at that time." "

"Six Heavenly Venerables, I am already very satisfied with being able to obtain the Void Realm Pill!"

Bai Ye Tianzun hurriedly said.

However, what Bai Ye Tianzun didn't know was that although the Void Realm Pill could help the Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm break the shackles and be promoted to the Sevenfold Dao Realm, the limit of his future cultivation would be the Sevenfold Dao Realm, and it would be almost impossible to break through to the Eightfold Dao Realm.

This is the flaw of the Void Realm Pill.

But even if it was the Tao, he didn't care.

After such a long period of time, Wuji Heavenly Palace has also given birth to an eightfold supreme Dao realm, like the six-fold Heavenly Venerable and other sevenfold supreme Dao realms, and so far it has not been unable to break through to the eightfold supreme Dao realm, and it is too difficult to comprehend the rules of the sixth sequence of supreme dao.

In the entire Infinite Domain, there was no chance for them to comprehend the rules of the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao, even those strange lands, there was no such opportunity.

As for how the Infinite Heavenly Emperor comprehended the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, they didn't know, they only knew that it was an opportunity obtained in the Void Realm.

These days.

One of the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms of the Wuji Heavenly Palace, while fighting with the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm of Taisu Palace and other forces, they also opened the treasure troves of the Wuji Heavenly Palace, taking out those resources to improve their own power or heal their injuries.

For example, the Sixth Cry Heavenly Venerable, the original cultivation was in the late stage of the Sevenfold Dao Realm, but now there is a tendency to be promoted to the peak of the Sevenfold Dao Realm.

"If we can defeat the forces such as Taisu Palace, we will take charge of the Infinite Domain, integrate resources, and then open the No. 1 Treasure Vault, and we may be able to find an opportunity to advance to the Eightfold Dao Realm inside!"

It's not just them who think so, but the other Sevenfold Dao realms also have this kind of thought.

If it can really be carried out according to their ideal appearance, then it is not a good thing for the Wuji Heavenly Emperor to be suppressed and sealed.

......

Taisu Palace.

A figure shuttled in, attracting the attention of a powerhouse of Taisu Palace.

"It's me!"

Ye Tian's figure emerged.

Swish!

The Taisu Palace Lord appeared, staring at Ye Tian, revealing a look of shock.

"Ye Tian, have you come out of the battlefield?"

The Taisu Palace Master was shocked.

Ye Tian had already found the excuse: "Lord Taisu Palace, this is my doppelganger, I entered the Void Domain before, and I was lucky not to die, and then I found a space node that was distorting, and I broke the node and came back." "

The distorted space node is less difficult to break, and the invincible strength of the Sixfold Dao Realm has the hope of breaking it.

So, there's nothing wrong with this argument.

The Taisu Palace Master also believed it.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian entered the Taisu Palace and saw the other Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms of the Taisu Palace and some of the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms of other forces.

Now, the headquarters of Taisu Palace has become the base camp, and the other Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms are also afraid of being besieged by the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm of the Infinite Heavenly Palace, so staying together is undoubtedly the best choice.

"Lord Taisu Palace, what is the battle situation now?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Taisu Palace Lord sighed and said: "Now, our side has fallen a total of two Sevenfold Extreme Dao Realms, and Wuji Heavenly Palace has fallen four Sevenfold Dao Realms, this is still the beginning of the fight that caught Wuji Heavenly Palace off guard, otherwise Wuji Heavenly Palace would not have lost so much." But now, they have reacted, and they still have a lot of resources and hole cards, and the war in the future is not easy to fight!"

But if it's not easy to fight, you have to fight, and this is the most promising opportunity.

"What can I do?"

Ye Tian asked.
